_wardline_provenance: Vendored copy of clarion/docs/federation/fixtures/wardline-qualname-normalization.json (clarion 1.0.0, 2026-05-30). Resync: copy that file here verbatim when Clarion's module_dotted_name rules change. The parity test (test_clarion_qualname_parity.py) fails loudly on divergence — fix core/qualname.py, never the fixture.
$comment: Normative parity fixture for the Wardline -> Clarion entity-reconciliation
Wardline's native Filigree emitter sets metadata.wardline.qualname to the
PRE-COMPOSED dotted form so it byte-matches Clarion's canonical_qualified_name.
Each vector below is a (file_path, qualname) input and the exact dotted form
Wardline must emit. Divergence on any vector silently degrades reconciliation
to resolution_confidence: heuristic|none — there is no error, only a worse match.
This file is the STANDALONE spec vector; the live conformance oracle
implemented as of release:1.1. Mirrors the role of fixtures/entity_id.json.

rules_source.composition: expected_qualified_name = module_dotted_name(file_path) + '.' + qualname  (qualname is Python __qualname__, copied verbatim incl. '<locals>' and dotted class chains)
module_rules: A leading 'src/' segment is stripped ONLY when it is the first path segment (UQ-WP3-05).
An '__init__' filename collapses to its containing package (UQ-WP3-06).
No other root marker (lib/, app/, tests/, the project name, ...) is stripped.
A top-level '__init__.py' normalizes to '' and is REJECTED by entity_id() — Clarion skips the file; Wardline must not emit such an entity.

module_normalization_vectors.description: flat (non-src) layout — same file, no src/ prefix
package __init__ under src/ collapses to the package
package __init__ without src/ collapses to the package
DIVERGENCE TRAP: non-src root 'lib/' is NOT stripped
module_normalization_vectors.note: An emitter that strips a generic 'source root' marker would wrongly produce 'foo'. Only a leading 'src/' is stripped.

module_normalization_vectors.description: DIVERGENCE TRAP: non-src root 'app/' is NOT stripped
DIVERGENCE TRAP: 'src' not at position 0 is NOT stripped
namespace-package-style layout (no src/, implicit namespace dirs)
REJECTED: top-level __init__.py normalizes to empty and is skipped
module_normalization_vectors.note: entity_id() rejects an empty qualified_name (crates/clarion-core/src/entity_id.rs). Clarion emits no entity for this file; a conformant Wardline emitter must not emit one either.

module_normalization_vectors.description: REJECTED: src/__init__.py normalizes to empty after src-strip
module_normalization_vectors.note: Same as above — no package name survives.

qualified_name_vectors.description: DIVERGENCE TRAP: closure carries Python '<locals>' marker verbatim
qualified_name_vectors.note: The '<locals>' segment is part of __qualname__ and must be preserved, not stripped or rewritten.

qualified_name_vectors.description: DIVERGENCE TRAP: nested-class chain preserved verbatim
DIVERGENCE TRAP: non-src root preserved in the module prefix of a method
namespace-package module prefix on a top-level function
module entity — no qualname; the module dotted name IS the qualified_name
